parameters.command: =mkdir -p /files/viral-pet/{{ $('🧩 Parse Callback').first().json.subdir }}/_archived && mv /files/viral-pet/{{ $('🧩 Parse Callback').first().json.subdir }}/{{ $('🧩 Parse Callback').first().json.run_id }} /files/viral-pet/{{ $('🧩 Parse Callback').first().json.subdir }}/_archived/ 2>/dev/null && echo ARCHIVED

parameters.text:
=❌ REJECTED — carousel archived, nothing posted.

Run: {{ $('🧩 Parse Callback').first().json.run_id }}

parameters.content:
## 🕯️ Soulpaws Approve Callback

Receives Telegram button tap on the soulpaws notify message.
- 'a:<run>' → Universal Poster (slideshow.mp4 → IG reel / TT / YT Shorts)
- 'r:<run>' → archive folder, edit message to REJECTED

Ignores taps where run_id doesn't start with 'soulpaws-' (so it doesn't grab cat/dog viral-pet taps).

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { "query": "mutation($i:CreatePostInput!){createPost(input:$i){ __typename ... on PostActionSuccess { post { id status } } ... on InvalidInputError { message } ... on RestProxyError { message code } ... on LimitReachedError { message } ... on UnexpectedError { message } } }", "variables": { "i": { "channelId": "6a180deac687a22dd4351483", "schedulingType": "automatic", "mode": "customScheduled", "dueAt": $json.sched_time, "text": $json.caption_tt, "assets": Array.from({length: $json.slide_count}, (_, idx) => ({ "image": { "url": "https://content.littlesouls.app/viral-pet-media/aria_frequency/" + $json.run_id + "/slide_" + String(idx+1).padStart(2, "0") + ".png" } })), "metadata": { "tiktok": { "title": ($json.theme || "aria").slice(0,90) } } } } } }}

parameters.command: =mkdir -p /files/viral-pet/{{ $('🧩 Parse Callback').first().json.subdir }}/_archived && mv /files/viral-pet/{{ $('🧩 Parse Callback').first().json.subdir }}/{{ $('🧩 Parse Callback').first().json.run_id }} /files/viral-pet/{{ $('🧩 Parse Callback').first().json.subdir }}/_archived/ 2>/dev/null && echo ARCHIVED

parameters.text:
=❌ REJECTED — carousel archived, nothing posted.

Run: {{ $('🧩 Parse Callback').first().json.run_id }}
